description: This file contains utility functions for Bootstrap, including DOM manipulation, style computation, event handling, and utility methods for handling elements, transitions, and jQuery integration.

methods.name: parseSelector
methods.description: Escapes IDs in selectors to handle special characters, using CSS.escape if available.

methods.name: toType
methods.description: Returns the type of an object as a lowercase string.

methods.name: getUID
methods.description: Generates a unique ID with a given prefix, ensuring it does not already exist in the document.

methods.name: getTransitionDurationFromElement
methods.description: Calculates the total transition duration of an element based on computed styles.

methods.name: triggerTransitionEnd
methods.description: Dispatches a transitionend event on a given element.

methods.name: isElement
methods.description: Checks if an object is a DOM element or a jQuery object wrapping a DOM element.

methods.name: getElement
methods.description: Returns a DOM element from a selector string, jQuery object, or DOM element.

methods.name: isVisible
methods.description: Determines if an element is visible, considering CSS visibility, client rects, and details/summary elements.

methods.name: isDisabled
methods.description: Checks if an element is disabled based on class, attribute, or property.

methods.name: findShadowRoot
methods.description: Recursively finds the shadow root of an element if it exists.

methods.name: reflow
methods.description: Forces a reflow by accessing offsetHeight.

methods.name: getjQuery
methods.description: Returns the global jQuery object if available and not disabled by data attribute.

methods.name: onDOMContentLoaded
methods.description: Registers a callback to be called when DOM content is loaded.

methods.name: isRTL
methods.description: Checks if the document direction is right-to-left.

methods.name: defineJQueryPlugin
methods.description: Defines a jQuery plugin for a Bootstrap component.

methods.name: execute
methods.description: Executes a callback if it is a function, otherwise returns a default value.

methods.name: executeAfterTransition
methods.description: Executes a callback after a CSS transition ends or after a timeout.

methods.name: getNextActiveElement
methods.description: Returns the next or previous element in a list, with optional cycling.
